text: According to safety regulations, which of the following is NOT strictly required to be part of the general onboard instructions for routine LSA maintenance?

options.text: Detailed tool lists for overhauling engines

explanation: While LSA maintenance instructions (e.g., lubrication and periodic inspection checklists) are mandatory under SOLAS, a detailed tool list for overhauling ship engines is not a specific requirement of the LSA maintenance documentation; it belongs to the Planned Maintenance System (PMS).
